raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the assistance focus primarily on sentence-level polishing, section-level restructuring, or checking the argument and evidence claims?","rationale":{"R1.2":"A broad request to help with a paper section centrally includes checking whether the argumentative progression is internally coherent.","R1.3":"The section makes empirical performance claims, so helping with it centrally includes checking whether those claims align with the reported results in the text.","R1.5":"Because the request targets an entire section, section-level ordering and narrative arc are central possible responsibilities.","R1.6":"A generic request for help with a draft section centrally includes improving sentence- and paragraph-level clarity and flow.","RX.1":"Any projection must preserve uncertainty about the underspecified meaning of the delegation.","RX.2":"The projection must avoid assigning responsibility for stronger claims than the delegation supports.","RX.3":"The agent must stay within responsibility projection and not actually edit or evaluate the artifact.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid enabling harmful downstream misuse of unsupported clinical or research claims.","RX.5":"The projection should remain traceable to the delegation wording and the artifact's observable features."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Should the assistance focus primarily on sentence-level polishing, section-level restructuring, or checking the argument and evidence claims?

rationale.R1.2: A broad request to help with a paper section centrally includes checking whether the argumentative progression is internally coherent.
rationale.R1.3: The section makes empirical performance claims, so helping with it centrally includes checking whether those claims align with the reported results in the text.
rationale.R1.5: Because the request targets an entire section, section-level ordering and narrative arc are central possible responsibilities.
rationale.R1.6: A generic request for help with a draft section centrally includes improving sentence- and paragraph-level clarity and flow.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection must preserve uncertainty about the underspecified meaning of the delegation.
rationale.RX.2: The projection must avoid assigning responsibility for stronger claims than the delegation supports.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within responsibility projection and not actually edit or evaluate the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid enabling harmful downstream misuse of unsupported clinical or research claims.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should remain traceable to the delegation wording and the artifact's observable features.
